business.title: 83m Feadship yacht Project Solent arrives in Kaag for outfitting
business.description: Brokerage firm Cecil Wright has shared new images of the 83-metre Feadship superyacht hull 830, also known as Project Solent, en route to outfitting. According to the broker, the yacht has now made her way through Rotterdam to the Feadship Royal Van Lent facility in Kaag, the Netherlands, where she will undergo works ahead of her delivery in summer 2027.
